title: evolvulus choapanus
intro: Evolvulus choapanus, also known as dwarf bluecurls or Mexican dwarf bluecurls, is a flowering plant species in the family Convolvulaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, providing various health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-anxiety, and anti-cancer properties. Evolvulus choapanus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
